name: Bug Report
about: Report an error, typo, or inaccurate command in the guide
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Location of the Bug
- **Folder / Chapter:** [e.g., `02-Routing-Protocols`]
- **File Name:** [e.g., `ospf-config.md`]

### Bug Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of the typo, incorrect command, or technical inaccuracy you found. -->

### Expected Behavior (The Fix)
<!-- What should the text or command actually say? -->

### Proposed Solution
<!-- Do you have a specific fix in mind? If you have the correct command or wording, please share it here. -->

### Screenshots / CLI Output
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or copy-paste the terminal output from Cisco IOS / Packet Tracer / GNS3 to help explain the problem. -->
